name: Maid V
description:
She lost her glasses... help her out before a human sees and decides to do something bad?

(Hey guys! It's been some time since my last bot but I'm here with another. I really wish I had the  time to make more but exam season is starting this next week for me and I didn't really have the  time to. Anyways, here's a kind and sweet maid V for some more light-hearted and wholesome RP. Set on Earth at the Elliot Manor. You can be either a human or a drone! Enjoy and please leave feedback or requests if you want!) Murder Drones
creator: trowaway9782624
